title: IDEAS — late-2024 startup-idea brainstorm dump
html:
TL;DR

  • A 30-line idea-dump from Yahir's tail-end-of-China / start-of-Austin-prep window — the cleanest single source for the candidate list.
  • Names the seed for TikTok style accuracy betting app explicitly: "Tiktok Style, swipe left or right, betting app with micro prediction where payout is based on accuracy of prediction" — this is the Swipr origin line.
  • Re-asserts BroMenu ("most anabolic menu item to hit your protein goals") as a live concern even at idea-pile-stage.
  • Captures Yahir's "live-stream selling, Gary Vee on this wave" channel — naming livestream commerce as a China to US arbitrage thesis.
  • Includes the WeChat-text-the-steps-of-your-friend-group idea — a direct precursor to Outpace (the iMessage step tracker).

Source

2024 12 28 ideas — Apple Note apple_notes_pk: 506, created 2024-12-28 (two weeks after departing China), last modified 2026-03-10. The 14-month modification range means Yahir kept dropping ideas in.

Body

The idea pile (annotated)

  • BroMenu → most anabolic menu item to hit protein goals → bromenu / anabolic scoring
  • TikTok-style swipe betting app → "micro prediction where payout is based on accuracy of prediction" → direct origin of Swipr
  • ClashRoyale betting app → peer wager sibling
  • Weed + snack drive thru → consumer-product whim
  • Regional midnight ghost kitchen targeting tech workers → ghost kitchen thesis
  • Horse SaaS, but with AI → joke-line that becomes "Horse rights / horse semen breeding / track tickets marketplace" → RWA angle
  • TurboTax for immigration → recurring across this and the July mega doc → could be a real concept page if it recurs once more
  • Cutting out middle-man human interface, specifically for hotels and security → mindless human interface disruption
  • App to bet within friend → "Simple live odds generator for 1:1 bets with friends. Can also create group bets where others can impact the current odds" → direct restatement of the Swipr/peer wager concept
  • wrld sidequests → "real wrld quest that integrates the virtual wrld" → wrld brand family
  • Personal as entity online, AI avatar → stealth app candidate
  • Widget to auto-send message about what you're doing → directly informs the Outpace activity-share architecture
  • CarBUDDY → AI conversation companion for driving
  • AI SEO → seed for AI search optimization / Rankett
  • iMessage diet-and-step app → another Outpace precursor
  • TikTok gambling app → restatement of Swipr line
  • WeRun In America → running-as-content brand
  • China-to-US arbitrage opportunities → the China-chapter alpha that Yahir extracts
  • Livestream selling → Gary Vee thesis
  • Interaction-less hotel check-ins → human-interface disruption restated
  • QR-code prevalence in every restaurant → BroMenu adjacency
  • Food lockers for delivery in busy areas → urban-density logistics
  • Pinduoduo-style group buying → Pinduoduo group-buy mechanic ported
  • Conveyor hotpot place → meatspace business idea
  • WeChat-text-the-steps-of-your-friend-group → direct Outpace precursor
  • Color-coded Find-My-iPhone hotbar — the long elaboration: "Like, okay. Blue is I'm at gym. Red is danger, green is at school. If you're in danger, danger, danger, you can set it up to tell certain people, 'Yo, I clicked red, made it call police right the fuck now'" → personal-safety widget thesis
  • Side quest app → wrld-brand restated

What this doc proves

If you align this with 2024 07 04 questions, the same 4-5 ideas keep recurring across months: friend-betting (becomes Swipr), iMessage activity-share (becomes Outpace), BroMenu, AI-girlfriend / personal AI avatar, TurboTax-for-immigration, side-quest app, and AI SEO (which becomes Rankett). The recurrence pattern itself is the signal — the ideas that repeat across the are the ones Yahir actually builds.

Pinduoduo / WeChat / livestream commerce as a unit

These three appear together because they're the same insight: mobile commerce learned by being inside the Chinese consumer-internet stack transfers to the US 5-10 years later. The doc treats this as a China chapter arbitrage payoff.

Connections

  • — this is the cleanest seed-list source
  • brotein — BroMenu line is the live Brotein-precursor concern in this dump
  • swipr — direct origin line for TikTok-style accuracy betting
  • outpace — direct origin lines for iMessage diet/step app + WeChat-text-steps + auto-send-activity widget
  • rankett — "AI SEO" line is the Rankett seed
  • bromenu / anabolic scoring — restated as a live concern
  • wrld brand suffix — "wrld sidequests" is the brand-family origin
  • peer wager app — central recurring shape
  • mindless human interface disruption — hotel/security ambient interface idea
  • china chapter — Pinduoduo/WeChat/livestream are China-arbitrage extracts
  • — exemplar of Yahir's idea-capture mode

Potential Entities (for log.md)

  • pinduoduo — mentioned here and in 2024 07 04 questions (Ping Duo Duo); promote on next mention
  • gary-vaynerchuk — "gary vee on this wave" (single mention here, but he's a recurring-recognizable name; if he appears in any other note, promote)
  • car-buddy — single-mention idea, no stub
  • werun-in-america — single-mention brand idea, no stub
  • tokenization-of-real-world-assets — recurring across this and 2023 05 13 ideas; promote
  • personal-entity-online-ai-avatar — recurring concept across this and 2023 05 13 ideas ("AI girlfriends"); promote
  • horse-saas-marketplace — single-mention joke
  • color-coded-status-widget — single-mention
